title: Looking for a trading journal with AI integration for a Supply/Demand trader?
author: thienpro2
selftext:
Hi everyone,

I trade Forex mainly using Supply and Demand concepts on the H4 and Daily timeframes. I’m currently looking for a trading journal tool that has AI features integrated to help analyze my trade performance or give insights.

Does anyone know of any tools that offer this? Any recommendations would be appreciated. Thanks!

replies.author: thienpro2
replies.body: but maybe neither of them intergates AI

comments.author: Careless-Equal6722
comments.body:
You might want to check out **ChartScopeAI Pro** [ChartScope AI Pro - Learn Candlestick Patterns | AI Chart Analysis](https://chartscopeai.org/)

It’s not a full trading journal yet, but it does use AI to analyze **chart screenshots**, focusing on market structure, supply & demand zones, trend context, and higher-timeframe bias — especially useful on H4 and Daily.

A few traders are using it alongside their journal to review *why* trades worked or didn’t, rather than just logging stats.

Still early and evolving, but if your focus is understanding structure and decision-making, it might be worth a look.

comments.author: Artistic_Emotion2539
comments.body: Supertrader+ has an AI mentor feature. I know they have a free trial so you can test it and see if it’s what you’re looking for.
